children.text: the amount, cost and type of fuels used for households eligible for assistance under this subchapter;
the type of fuel used by various income groups;
the number and income levels of households assisted by this subchapter;
the number of households which received such assistance and include one or more individuals who are 60 years or older or disabled or include young children; and
any other information which the Secretary determines to be reasonably necessary to carry out the provisions of this subchapter.
the manner in which States carry out the requirements of clauses (2), (5), (8), and (15) of ; andsection 8624(b) of this title
the impact of each State’s program on recipient and eligible households.
